creator: root@ai1.alaska.net
text:
Despite the Makefile having the line:
    IGNORE=         requires pciVideoPtr typedef
    make fails on this error.

Fix: 

Do not know.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-via
make
===>  xf86-video-via-0.2.2_9 requires pciVideoPtr typedef.
*** [all] Error code 1
Stop in /umass/ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-via.
